retiredRules.expectedRemediation: Deleted without a lexical replacement; judge entropy by declared seed and owner, not helper spelling.

retiredRules.retiredReason: Raw helper tokens do not encode entropy provenance.

retiredRules.expectedRemediation: Deleted exact-call proxy; keep official-generator authored-truth ownership in deterministic authored-generation and typed placement authority.

The accepted invariant is the class-level ban on official generator output as authored planning truth, with explicit materialization exceptions, not these spellings.
retiredRules.retiredReason: Exact callee names are a brittle proxy for capability ownership.
